ValidationRule.description: Users other than issue owner cannot mute notifications
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Profile.Name != 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name != 'Rubrik Light Administrator', PRIORVALUE(Mute_notifications__c) = false, Mute_notifications__c, $User.Id != Owner__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not authorised to mute the notifications. Only issue owner can mute.
